bot.name: 1h First-Red Shadow
bot.hypothesis: Waiting for the first red 1h candle after the pump (enter at its close) beats entering at peak. SL=min(peak*1.03, entry*1.05). UN-RETIRED 2026-07-17: registry said retired while the bot kept trading (auto-loop REGISTRY MISMATCH); Justin reviewed — it stays live as the no-fee red-candle benchmark.
